verdict.label: Probably skip
verdict.headline: No reliable window
verdict.reason: Main blocker: wind is over 30 km/h.

conversationalSummary.text: TODAY is probably one to skip—there’s no reliable window, mainly because the wind looks too strong and cross-onshore. Surfline and MEO Beachcam aren’t painting a great picture, so I wouldn’t bother chasing waves at Baleal, even with lunch as the least-bad option. I’ll check the cams before leaving, and unless they surprise us with much cleaner conditions, I’m saving the drive.

best.windFit: N 30 km/h · cross-onshore · too windy, strong
best.bestWind: ideal E/ESE/SE, usable NE/ENE/SSE, clean <=25 km/h

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

best.explanation: Baleal looks like a fun-sized window for Safe fun, Medium confidence: 0.9-1.2 m, 266 kJ, 10 s period, consistent 68/100, and wind is the main risk.  A broad, forgiving beach setup with several peaks; this is best for spreading out and finding a manageable wave when the bay has enough push; 10-13s at mid tide suits the Baleal sandbanks and gives workable peaks; worth keeping on the radar because Surfline is showing it above Poor while most other local spots are Poor..  Watch: wind is over 30 km/h; wind fit is poor or too strong.
best.shortExplanation: Baleal is worth a quick check for lunch, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  Wind is the main thing to watch.  The tide and timing are lining up well for this spot.
warnings: wind fit is poor or too strong

ranked.explanation: Supertubos looks like a fun-sized window for Worth checking, Medium confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 67 kJ, 10 s period, lully 27/100, and wind is the main risk.  A fast, hollow sand-bottom wave that gets serious quickly; this is best for short, punchy bodyboard barrels when it is small enough for comfort; 10-13s at mid tide is the prime barrel / wedge setup for Supertubos / Molhe Leste; worth keeping on the radar because Surfline is showing it above Poor while most other local spots are Poor..  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; wind is over 30 km/h; wind fit is poor or too strong.
ranked.shortExplanation: Supertubos is worth a quick check for lunch, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  Wind is the main thing to watch.  The tide is lining up for a powerful wedge, so keep the comfort level in mind.
warnings: wind fit is poor or too strong
